review_summary: HERMES_GATE_STATUS_VALUES exported and bound to CONTROL_PLANE_LIFECYCLE_STATES.
HERMES_GATE_STATUS_POLICY exported with required status field, terminal statuses, transition-map defer to S10, and validation-helper defer to S11.
validateHermesGateStatus accepts known statuses and rejects unknown, uppercase, hyphenated, blank, and stored-whitespace statuses.
Synthetic fixture, registry future-only HermesGate boundary, no-real-data/no-write boundaries, and next subphase RP00.P01.M03.S06 passed review.
